ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player is assigned to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Status of the player (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who incurred the penalty */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game where the penalty occurred */,
  "pim" INTEGER /* Penalty minutes incurred */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the penalty occurred */,
  "against_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team during the penalty */,
  "penalty_type" TEXT /* Type of penalty (e.g., minor, major, misconduct) */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period of the game when the penalty occurred */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who issued the penalty */,
  "penalty_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the penalty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_against_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("against_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suspensions" (
  "suspension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspension */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who is suspended */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the suspension */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the suspension */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the suspension */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to suspension */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who issued the suspension */,
  "suspension_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the suspension */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suspensions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fines" (
  "fine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fine */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who is fined */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the fine */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the fine was imposed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the fine */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the fine was paid */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who issued the fine */,
  "fine_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the fine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fines_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disciplinary_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disciplinary action */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player against whom the action is taken */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disciplinary action */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the action was taken */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of disciplinary action (e.g., warning, probation) */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who issued the action */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disciplinary_actions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, manager, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user is associated with */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
